translations.ru: Завтра снова поеду кататься на лыжах.
translations.vi: Ngày mai tôi lại đi trượt tuyết.
translations.uk: Завтра знову поїду кататися на лижах.
translations.hi: मैं कल फिर स्की करने जाऊँगा.
translations.nb: I morgen skal jeg stå på ski igjen.
translations.sv: I morgon ska jag åka skidor igen.
translations.ro: Mâine merg din nou la schi.
translations.da: I morgen skal jeg stå på ski igen.
translations.ja: 明日またスキーに行きます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite verb, 1st person singular present; main predicate. Used in the fixed collocation 'Ski fahren' meaning 'to ski'.
Temporal adverb indicating the time of the event; modifies the verb.
Adverb expressing repetition; modifies the verb phrase.
Noun functioning as the bare object in the set phrase 'Ski fahren'; no article, mass-like usage in this collocation.

sentences.target: Der linke Ski hat eine kleine Macke.
sentences.reading: /deːɐ̯ ˈlɪŋkə ʃiː hat ˈaɪ̯nə ˈklaɪ̯nə ˈmakə/

translations.de: Der linke Ski hat eine kleine Macke.
translations.ipa: /deːɐ̯ ˈlɪŋkə ʃiː hat ˈaɪ̯nə ˈklaɪ̯nə ˈmakə/
translations.en: The left ski has a small nick.
translations.es: El esquí izquierdo tiene una pequeña muesca.
translations.fr: Le ski gauche a un petit éclat.
translations.it: Lo sci sinistro ha una piccola scheggiatura.
translations.zh-Hans: 左边的滑雪板有个小缺口。
translations.yue: 左邊嗰隻滑雪板有個細細嘅崩位。
translations.ru: На левой лыже есть небольшой скол.
translations.pt: O esqui esquerdo tem uma pequena lasca.
translations.tr: Sol kayakta küçük bir çizik var.
translations.vi: Chiếc ván trượt tuyết bên trái có một vết sứt nhỏ.
translations.nl: De linker ski heeft een kleine beschadiging.
translations.uk: На лівій лижі є невеликий скол.
translations.hu: A bal sílécen van egy kis sérülés.
translations.hi: बाएँ वाले स्की में एक छोटा सा निशान है.
translations.el: Το αριστερό σκι έχει ένα μικρό σημάδι.
translations.nb: Den venstre skien har en liten skramme.
translations.id: Di ski kiri ada goresan kecil.
translations.sv: Den vänstra skidan har en liten flisa.
translations.ro: Schiul din stânga are o mică ciobitură.
translations.da: Den venstre ski har et lille hak.
translations.ja: 左のスキーに小さな欠けがあります。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative masculine singular; determines the noun 'Ski' as definite.
Attributive adjective, inflected; modifies 'Ski' to specify it as the left one.
Noun, singular; head of the subject noun phrase.
Finite verb, 3rd person singular present; main predicate taking a direct object.
Indefinite article, feminine singular accusative; determines the object noun 'Macke'.
Attributive adjective, inflected; modifies 'Macke'.
Noun, feminine; direct object meaning a defect/blemish.

sentences.target: Ich trage den Ski gleich ins Auto.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈtʁaːɡə deːn ʃiː ɡlaɪ̯ç ɪns ˈaʊ̯to/

translations.de: Ich trage den Ski gleich ins Auto.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈtʁaːɡə deːn ʃiː ɡlaɪ̯ç ɪns ˈaʊ̯to/
translations.en: I’m taking the ski to the car soon.
translations.es: Enseguida llevo el esquí al coche.
translations.fr: Je vais tout de suite mettre le ski dans la voiture.
translations.it: Tra poco porto lo sci in macchina.
translations.zh-Hans: 一会儿我就把滑雪板搬到车上。
translations.yue: 陣間我會攞支滑雪板擺上車。
translations.pt: Daqui a pouco levo o esqui para o carro.
translations.he: עוד מעט אכניס את הסקי לאוטו.
translations.vi: Chút nữa tôi sẽ mang chiếc ván trượt tuyết ra xe.
translations.ar: بعد قليل سأضع المِزلاج في السيارة.
translations.nl: Zo meteen breng ik de ski naar de auto.
translations.hu: Mindjárt beviszem a sílécet az autóba.
translations.hi: थोड़ी देर में मैं स्की कार में रख दूँगा.
translations.el: Σε λίγο θα βάλω το σκι στο αυτοκίνητο.
translations.nb: Snart bærer jeg skien inn i bilen.
translations.id: Sebentar lagi saya akan membawa ski itu ke mobil.
translations.sv: Snart bär jag in skidan i bilen.
translations.ro: În curând duc schiul la mașină.
translations.cs: Za chvilku odnesu lyži do auta.
translations.da: Om lidt bærer jeg skien ind i bilen.
translations.ja: もうすぐスキーを車に運びます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite verb, 1st person singular present; main predicate meaning 'to carry'.
Definite article, accusative masculine singular; marks 'Ski' as definite direct object.
Noun, singular; direct object of 'trage'.
Temporal adverb indicating immediacy; modifies the verb phrase.
Preposition (contraction of 'in das') governing accusative; indicates direction into a location.
Noun; object of the preposition 'ins' (destination).

sentences.target: Im Keller steht noch ein Ski.

translations.de: Im Keller steht noch ein Ski.
translations.en: There’s still a ski in the basement.
translations.es: En el sótano todavía hay un esquí.
translations.fr: Il y a encore un ski dans la cave.
translations.it: In cantina c'è ancora uno sci.
translations.ko: 지하실에 아직 스키 한 짝이 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 地下室里还有一只滑雪板。
translations.ru: В подвале ещё осталась одна лыжа.
translations.pt: Ainda há um esqui no porão.
translations.tr: Bodrumda hâlâ bir tane kayak var.
translations.vi: Trong tầng hầm vẫn còn một chiếc ván trượt tuyết.
translations.ar: في القبو لا يزال هناك مزلاج واحد.
translations.nl: In de kelder staat nog één ski.
translations.uk: У підвалі ще стоїть одна лижа.
translations.hu: A pincében még van egy síléc.
translations.hi: तहखाने में अभी भी एक स्की पड़ी है.
translations.pl: W piwnicy wciąż stoi jedna narta.
translations.el: Στο υπόγειο υπάρχει ακόμα ένα σκι.
translations.nb: I kjelleren står det fortsatt én ski.
translations.id: Di ruang bawah tanah masih ada satu ski.
translations.sv: I källaren står det fortfarande en skida.
translations.ro: În pivniță mai este un schi.
translations.cs: Ve sklepě ještě stojí jedna lyže.
translations.da: I kælderen står der stadig én ski.
translations.ja: 地下室にまだスキーが一本残っています。

tokens.explanation: Preposition (contraction of 'in dem') governing dative; sets a locative frame.

Indefinite article, nominative masculine singular; determines 'Ski' as an indefinite subject.
Noun, singular; grammatical subject following the verb in V2 order.
